headline: Netflix Labeled 'Top Pick' Among Media Stocks. Here's Why.
summary: UBS on Tuesday named Netflix its "top pick" among media stocks.  "We believe the wider direct-to-consumer environment will continue to shift in Netflix's favor with peers rationalizing spend and raising price while industry consolidation would only accelerate these trends," the investment bank said in a client note.  In midday trades on the stock market today, Netflix stock climbed more than 2% to 95.51.

raw.headline: Netflix Labeled 'Top Pick' Among Media Stocks. Here's Why.

In midday trades on the stock market today, Netflix stock climbed more than 2% to 95.51.
